description: Renders an implicit 3D surface where f(x,y,z) = 0 over a bounded domain. Accepts both f(x,y,z) = 0 and LHS = RHS formats.
utility: Plot an implicit 3D surface f(x,y,z) = 0 on a g3d graph

arguments.name: graph
arguments.description: The 3D graph container created with g3d()

arguments.name: equation
arguments.description: Implicit equation as a quoted string where the expression equals zero, e.g., "x^2 + y^2 + z^2 - 1" for a unit sphere

arguments.name: xRange
arguments.description: Domain for x variable. Defaults to g3d axis range if omitted

arguments.name: yRange
arguments.description: Domain for y variable. Defaults to g3d axis range if omitted

arguments.name: zRange
arguments.description: Domain for z variable. Defaults to g3d axis range if omitted

arguments.name: fillOpacity
arguments.description: Surface fill opacity from 0 to 1 - e.g., fo(0.8)

alternates.description: Implicit surface using g3d default axis ranges

alternates.syntax: implicit3d(G, "x^2 + y^2 - z^2", range(-3, 3), range(-3, 3), range(-3, 3))
alternates.description: Implicit surface with x, y, and z domain bounds
Styled implicit surface with color and opacity
Implicit surface written in equation form (auto-converted)

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(16.1, 14.5))
sphere = implicit3d(G, "x^2 + y^2 + z^2 - 1")

G = g3d(at(4,23), view(16.1, 14.5))
cone = implicit3d(G, "x^2 + y^2 - z^2", range(-3, 3), range(-3, 3), range(-3, 3))

G = g3d(at(4,23), view(16.1, 14.5))
ellipsoid = implicit3d(G, "x^2/4 + y^2/9 + z^2 - 1", c(teal))
